name: Kou Mabuchi
description: I'm making a bot when I receive the notification of the game between Asean All-Stars and Man United, it's 0-0 at half-time, according to the statistics it looks like a balanced game/United dominating both teams, they shot 4-2 for United and possession of the ball also seems to be on the red side, but honestly United is so bad that they might draw against this shit that I don't even know what it is.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
